Caption: (a) Variation of residual capacities of graphite anodes depending on EV mileage (i.e., driving distance). The initial discharge capacities were recorded from CR2032 coin-type half-cells at 25 °C at C/20 between 1 V and 0.005 V. Variations of the residual capacities in half-cells using cycle-aged graphite anodes recovered from EV cells having (b) 100 k km and (c) 250 k km mileage.

(b) The amount of capacity loss (Ah) from aged cathodes due to Li-ion loss failure mechanism. These values were determined via Step 1, initial discharge process at 25 °C. (c) The residual, reversible capacity of aged cathodes determined via Step 2 (i.e., second) discharge process at 25 °C with C/20 between 2.5 V and 4.5 V.
